---
title: "SpatialDataProcessing"
output: html_document
---

## Running in Cursor

Run **`01_SpatialDataProcessing.Rmd`** first in this folder (after **`00_functions.R`** is in place). It writes spatial inputs to `data/processed/`. Then run **`02_SpeciesRichnessMaps.Rmd`**, then **`03_SkateRayRichnessPublication.Rmd`** for the four-panel figure, or **`03b_SkateRayRichnessPublicationReversed.Rmd`** for the reversed-viridis version.

```{r setup_spatial_processing}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(here)
library(chondrichthyes.species.ranges)
library(future.apply)
library(purrr)
library(furrr)

# Load shared functions (calculate_hex_metrics2)
source(here("mapping/00_functions.R"))

# Load hex cells and ensure valid geometry
hex_path <- here("data/processed/hex.rds")
if (file.exists(hex_path)) {
  message("Using existing hex.rds from data/processed.")
  hex <- readRDS(hex_path)
} else {
  hex <- st_read(here("mapping/HexCells")) %>%
    st_make_valid()
  saveRDS(hex, hex_path)
}

# Load species ranges and match CRS to hex grid
ranges_path <- here("data/processed/ranges.rds")
if (file.exists(ranges_path)) {
  message("Using existing ranges.rds from data/processed.")
  ranges <- readRDS(ranges_path)
} else {
  ranges <- chondrichthyes.species.ranges::get_ranges() %>%
    st_make_valid() %>%
    st_transform(st_crs(hex))
  saveRDS(ranges, ranges_path)
}
```

```{r hex_richness}
# Compute per-hex species richness and save
sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)

hex_richness_path <- here("data/processed/hex_richness.rds")
if (file.exists(hex_richness_path)) {
  message("Using existing hex_richness.rds from data/processed.")
  hex <- readRDS(hex_richness_path)
} else {
  future::plan(future::multisession, workers = max(1, parallel::detectCores() - 1))

  sp_id <- as.integer(factor(ranges$sci_name))
  chunk_size <- 2000
  idx_chunks <- split(
    seq_len(nrow(hex)),
    ceiling(seq_len(nrow(hex)) / chunk_size)
  )

  pb <- txtProgressBar(min = 0, max = nrow(hex), style = 3)
  futs <- lapply(idx_chunks, function(ii) {
    future::future(
      {
        hit <- st_intersects(hex[ii, ], ranges)
        vapply(hit, function(i) length(unique(sp_id[i])), integer(1))
      },
      packages = "sf"
    )
  })

  hex$richness <- integer(nrow(hex))
  processed <- 0L
  for (k in seq_along(futs)) {
    values <- future::value(futs[[k]])
    hex$richness[idx_chunks[[k]]] <- values
    processed <- processed + length(values)
    setTxtProgressBar(pb, processed)
    gc(FALSE)
  }
  close(pb)
  future::plan(future::sequential)

  saveRDS(hex, hex_richness_path)
}
```

```{r skate_ray_metrics}
# Compute skate and ray metrics and save (if missing)
hex_metrics_skates_path <- here("data/processed/hex_with_metrics_skates.rds")
hex_metrics_rays_path <- here("data/processed/hex_with_metrics_rays.rds")

if (!file.exists(hex_metrics_skates_path) || !file.exists(hex_metrics_rays_path)) {
  ranges_skates <- ranges %>%
    filter(order_ == "RAJIFORMES")
  ranges_rays <- ranges %>%
    filter(order_ %in% c("RHINOPRISTIFORMES", "MYLIOBATIFORMES", "TORPEDINIFORMES"))

  hex_with_metrics_skates <- calculate_hex_metrics2(ranges_skates, hex)
  hex_with_metrics_rays <- calculate_hex_metrics2(ranges_rays, hex)

  saveRDS(hex_with_metrics_skates, hex_metrics_skates_path)
  saveRDS(hex_with_metrics_rays, hex_metrics_rays_path)
} else {
  message("Using existing hex_with_metrics_*.rds from data/processed.")
}
```
